title: Bitcoin Miner Marathon Digital Reports Q3 Profitability
text: Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) reported strong Q3 2025 earnings with revenue climbing 92% year over year to $252.4 million, though missing consensus estimates by $3.3 million. The company swung from a $124.8 million loss a year ago to $123.1 million in net income. EPS was $0.27 versus $0.45 estimated, down 40% from expectations, with adjusted EBITDA of $395.6 million versus $22.3 million in Q3 2024, up 1,674%. The company mined 2,144 Bitcoin during Q3, with average Bitcoin price increased 88%, contributing $113.3 million to revenue. Bitcoin holdings surged by 98% year-over-year to 52,850 Bitcoin compared to 26,747 at the end of Q3 2024. Energized hash rate increased 64% from 36.9 to 60.4 exahash per second. The company is expanding into AI infrastructure with new inference rack deployments and framing itself as a vertically integrated digital energy and infrastructure company. However, the company provided no specific metrics on AI revenue contribution, deployment timelines, or expected margins.
